title: jatropha collina
intro: Jatropha collina, also known as the hill jatropha or Jatropha montana, is a plant species in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) that is native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The leaves and roots of Jatropha collina are used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Jatropha collina include decoctions of the leaves and roots, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the affected area.
